reasoning: The control SC-7(5) focuses on boundary protection by enforcing a 'deny by default, allow by exception' policy for network communications. In Kubernetes, this can be implemented using NetworkPolicies to ensure that ingress and egress traffic is denied by default, and only explicitly allowed traffic is permitted. This aligns with the control's requirement to restrict network communication by default and allow only specified exceptions.
title: Boundary Protection - Boundary protection | deny by default — allow by exception deny network communic
